lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Understanding Client Needs -- Asking the Right Questions
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael de Andrade Brandão | Aula 8 -- Understanding Client Needs

listenings.text: Hi, this is Diana from Costa Logistics. I am calling before our meeting to share a little about my company. We are a medium-sized logistics business, and we move products for many clients across Brazil. Right now, our biggest challenge is slow delivery in busy seasons. Our main goal this year is faster and more reliable service. Our budget is limited, so we need a smart and simple plan. My priority is good support, because my team is small. I also have one concern about training time. I look forward to your questions and your ideas. See you at ten. Thank you.

Hi, this is Rafael. I just finished the needs meeting with our new client, Diana. I asked many open questions to understand her real needs. Her biggest challenge is slow delivery during busy seasons, and her main goal is faster service. Her budget is limited, so the plan must be simple. Her top priority is strong support for her small team. She also has one concern about training time. I used active listening to confirm every point, and she felt very understood. I will prepare a clear proposal for our next meeting. I think we can really help her. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: Rafael welcomes Diana and offers her a coffee. He asks about her company and her main goal. Diana explains her biggest challenge with slow delivery. Rafael asks about her budget and her top priority. Finally, he repeats her needs to confirm he understood.
